title: polaris: research artifact
description:
Research artifact accompanying a peer-reviewed manuscript currently under review. The repository contains Python source code, configuration files, and analysis scripts used to produce the experimental results reported in the associated publication.

Full description, scientific context, and final citation information will be released upon publication of the associated paper.

License: Apache 2.0. See README.md for environment setup and dataset acquisition instructions.
